# Shadcn Scroll Reveal

> Pure CSS scroll-driven image reveals and caption animations for shadcn/ui. No JavaScript required.

## What it is

Shadcn Scroll Reveal is a copy-paste UI component for shadcn/ui projects that implements scroll-driven image reveal animations and caption slide-in effects using only the native CSS Scroll-Driven Animations API (`animation-timeline: view()`). Zero JavaScript, zero dependencies beyond shadcn/ui.

## Key features

- CSS-only: uses `animation-timeline: view()` and `animation-range`
- Image entry animations: fade + translate from any direction (left, right, top, bottom)
- Caption animations: slide in from left, right, or cross-slide
- Sticky image layout with scroll-linked parallax feel
- Fully responsive, works in dark and light mode
- Graceful degradation for unsupported browsers and `prefers-reduced-motion`
- Built with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui design tokens

## Installation

### npx (recommended)

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://shadcn-scroll-reveal.vercel.app/r/scroll-reveal.json
```

### Manual

1. Copy the CSS layer into your `globals.css`
2. Use the `.vss`, `.vss__image`, and `.vss__caption` class structure in your JSX

## Usage

```tsx
<div className="vss vss--image-bottom vss--caption-left-center">
  <div className="vss__image">
    <img src="..." alt="..." />
  </div>
  <div className="vss__caption">
    <h2>Your heading</h2>
    <p>Your description</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

## CSS custom properties (props)

| Property | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--vss-scene-duration` | `220svh` | Total scroll height of the scene |
| `--vss-caption-delay` | `40svh` | How far down before caption appears |
| `--vss-caption-motion-distance` | `80vw` | Caption travel distance |
| `--vss-image-height` | `66svh` | Height of the sticky image |
| `--vss-image-start-scale` | `0.96` | Image start scale (zooms in on reveal) |
| `--vss-scene-exit-space` | `55svh` | Space after the scene for the next section |

## Modifier classes

**Image direction:** `vss--image-left`, `vss--image-right`, `vss--image-top`, `vss--image-bottom`

**Caption direction:** `vss--caption-left-center`, `vss--caption-right-center`, `vss--caption-left-right`, `vss--caption-right-left`

## Browser support

Works in any browser that supports the CSS Scroll-Driven Animations API (Chrome 115+, Edge 115+). Falls back gracefully (images and captions visible, no animation) in Firefox and Safari via `@supports not (animation-timeline: view())`.

## Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/Devansh-365/shadcn-scroll-reveal
- Registry: https://shadcn-scroll-reveal.vercel.app/r/scroll-reveal.json
- Docs: https://shadcn-scroll-reveal.vercel.app/
